title: StatusPlay
description: A simple serverside fabric mod that allows players to set their status
body:
This simple fabric mod allows players to set their status on a server

![Statuses will be seen as [Status] PlayerName](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3533b991ebfc2ba743373a1e2d4f2883d27d6934.png)

## Commands

### /status

Set your status:
```
/status <id>
```
Remove your status:

```
/status
```

### /ms
This command is used for managing statuses and can only used by admins

Add a new simple colored status (text will be [name]):

```
/ms add <id> colored <name> <color>
```

Add a new custom status (text in json formatting):

```
/ms add <id> custom <text>
```

Remove a status:

```
/ms remove <id>
```

Set a status to a player


```
/ms set <player> <id>
```
